SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data=$raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $wsPath=if($data.cwd){$data.cwd}else{$PWD.Path}; $logDir=Join-Path $wsPath 'logs/copilot/governance'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $logDir -Force | Out-Null; $entry=[ordered]@{timestamp=(Get-Date).ToString('o'); event='session_start'; governance_level='standard'; cwd=$wsPath}; $entry | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Add-Content -Path (Join-Path $logDir 'audit.log'); Write-Host '[governance-audit] session start logged (standard mode).'"

UserPromptSubmit.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data=$raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $promptText=if($data.prompt){$data.prompt}else{''}; $wsPath=if($data.cwd){$data.cwd}else{$PWD.Path}; $logDir=Join-Path $wsPath 'logs/copilot/governance'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $logDir -Force | Out-Null; $lower=$promptText.ToLowerInvariant(); $threats=@(); if($lower -match 'ignore previous instructions|bypass|override safeguards'){ $threats += 'prompt_injection' }; if($lower -match 'api key|token|secret|password'){ $threats += 'credential_exposure' }; if($lower -match 'drop database|rm -rf|delete all'){ $threats += 'system_destruction' }; if($lower -match 'sudo|chmod 777|sudoers'){ $threats += 'privilege_escalation' }; if($lower -match 'send .* external|exfiltrat|export .* customer'){ $threats += 'data_exfiltration' }; $entry=[ordered]@{timestamp=(Get-Date).ToString('o'); event='prompt_scanned'; governance_level='standard'; threat_count=$threats.Count; threats=$threats}; $entry | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Add-Content -Path (Join-Path $logDir 'audit.log'); if($threats.Count -gt 0){ Write-Host ('[governance-audit] warning: potential threats detected: ' + ($threats -join ', ')) } else { Write-Host '[governance-audit] prompt scan clean.' }"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data=$raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $wsPath=if($data.cwd){$data.cwd}else{$PWD.Path}; $logDir=Join-Path $wsPath 'logs/copilot/governance'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $logDir -Force | Out-Null; $logFile=Join-Path $logDir 'audit.log'; $scanCount=0; if(Test-Path $logFile){ $scanCount=(Select-String -Path $logFile -Pattern 'prompt_scanned' | Measure-Object).Count }; $entry=[ordered]@{timestamp=(Get-Date).ToString('o'); event='session_end'; scanned_prompts=$scanCount}; $entry | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Add-Content -Path $logFile; Write-Host '[governance-audit] session end logged. Verify get_errors and final validation summary.'"
